events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, June 5 through Labor Day (Sep 7, 2026)
events.venue: Corner of D Street & Ocean Avenue, Cayucos
events.summary: Fresh local produce, flowers & fish sold every Friday morning along Ocean Ave, running from early June through Labor Day weekend.

events.title: Schooners Open Mic Night
events.summary: Weekly open-mic hosted by Kam Alton every Wednesday at Schooners beachfront bar & restaurant, year-round.

events.title: Schooners Beachside Summer Concert Series
events.window: Every Sunday, 6pm to 8pm, May through October
events.venue: Schooners Patio, 171 N Ocean Ave, Cayucos
events.summary: Free rotating roster of local & touring acts performs outdoors on Schooners' beachside patio every Sunday evening, May–Oct.

events.title: Old Cayucos Tavern Live Music Weekends
events.venue: Old Cayucos Tavern & Card Room, 130 N Ocean Ave, Cayucos
events.summary: Local & traveling bands play Friday and Saturday nights at the historic 1906 tavern on Ocean Ave, with dancing and Texas Hold'em after.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run & Half Marathon
events.venue: Starts: Morro Rock, Morro Bay — Finishes: Cayucos Pier
events.summary: 56th annual 6-mile beach run from Morro Rock to Cayucos Pier (all ages/abilities), plus a 12th-annual half-marathon. Bus return from Cayucos Pier.

events.title: Estero Bluffs Coastal Cleanup Day
events.venue: Killer's Surf Spot (Fig Tree Parking Lot), N. Ocean Ave, Cayucos
events.summary: Annual volunteer beach & bluffs cleanup in coordination with California Coastal Cleanup Day. Meet at Fig Tree lot; spread over 4-mile Estero Bluffs stretch.

events.title: Cayucos Fall Antique Street Faire
events.venue: N. Ocean Avenue (Cayucos Dr. to E St.), Cayucos
events.summary: 100+ antique, vintage & collectibles dealers line Ocean Ave 7am–3pm. Free admission, dog-friendly, rain or shine; food court at D St. intersection.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic car show fills downtown Ocean Ave 8am–4pm with a live band, beer garden, and Lions Club BBQ lunch. Check-in party Friday Nov 6 at Nelson's Garage.
